body.title: Surface experiment outcomes in reasoning context
body.result: cfcaa357 — recent_completed() in scheduler, _recent_experiments_section in prompt_contexts, LLMPeerAdvisor passes recent experiments to reasoning_context. 3 tests.
body.description: When building reasoning_context for a workflow, include recent experiment results (OBSERVED/UPDATED) relevant to the current situation. This way the next reasoning cycle knows what was already tried and what was learned. Query experiments table by related memory IDs or topic overlap.
